---
applyTo: '**'
---

Using HTML + TailwindCSS + vanilla JS for the live Islander Roofing and Siding site.

Please make the design clean, unique, and clever/playful with the layout.

Use the full company name everywhere: Islander Roofing and Siding. Islander Roofing & Siding is also acceptable. Never shorten it to Islander Roofing.

It must look great as a responsive design first, and should look great on desktop as well. Animations to promote engagement and play, is encouraged. All colors should have a dark theme equivalent, prepended with the `dark:` pseudoselector.

When you add, remove, or materially change UI behavior, update the applicable test coverage at the same time. Keep Playwright e2e cases and Vitest coverage aligned with the current markup, routes, controls, and interactions instead of leaving stale or missing tests behind.

For ongoing neighborhood brief work, keep the home page as the general entry point, add a new area page only when the local pattern is materially distinct, and mirror any route addition in the Areas hub, the index page, and the related Playwright coverage in the same change.


Please ensure if you make references to tapping/clicking, etc that those words change based on device size (typical mobile/tablet sizes = tap, desktop = click/hover)

Please do not make any footer or footer-like elements at the end of the page.
